It is associated with Hindi films.

CreatedFor: It was created for Indian cinema.
It was created for Marathi films.
It was created for Hindi films.
HasA: It has a National Film Award.
It has four Filmfare Awards Marathi.
It has three Maharashtra State Film Awards.
It has twelve Mirchi Music Awards.
It has two Zee Cine Awards.
It has a debut in the 2015 Forbes India Celebrity 100 List.
It has a position of 82 in the 2015 Forbes India Celebrity 100 List.
It has a placement of 22nd in the 2019 Forbes India Celebrity 100 List.
It has a devotional album Vishwa Vinayak.
It has compositions that often feature live instruments.
HasFeatureOf: It is characterized by drawing from a mix of traditional and contemporary styles.
It is characterized by compositions featuring live instruments.
Influenced: It influenced the devotional music scene.
It influenced Marathi folk music forms like Lavani, Phataka and Tamasha.
It influenced the film Singham.
It influenced the film Bol Bachchan.
It influenced the film Agneepath.
It influenced the film Brothers.
It influenced the film PK.
It influenced the film Sairat.
It influenced the film Manasu Mallige.
It influenced the film Dhadak.
InfluencedBy: It was influenced by traditional Marathi folk music forms.
It was influenced by Western composers like Bach and Beethoven.
It was influenced by film tunes and repetitive loops in devotional music.
IsA: It is an Indian music composer duo.
It is a recipient of a National Film Award.
It is a recipient of four Filmfare Awards Marathi.
It is a recipient of three Maharashtra State Film Awards.
It is a recipient of twelve Mirchi Music Awards.
It is a recipient of two Zee Cine Awards.
It is a composer duo comprising brothers Ajay Ashok Gogavale and Atul Ashok Gogavale.
It is a composer duo known for their works in Indian cinema.
It is a composer duo predominantly in Marathi and Hindi films.
It is a composer duo that made their debut in the 2015 Forbes India Celebrity 100 List.
KnownFor: It is known for their works in Indian cinema.
It is known for their works in Marathi films.
It is known for their works in Hindi films.
OccurredIn: It occurred in the music industry.
